gap.title: Validate vLLM/Gemma 4 endpoint connectivity
gap.description: Verify that the Python orchestrator can connect to the vLLM Gemma 4 instance running on the p5en GPU box. Test the OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint with a simple prompt.

gap.title: End-to-end orchestrator with real GitHub issue and Gemma 4
gap.description: Create a real GitHub issue in symph-test-10 repo, start the orchestrator pointing at vLLM/Gemma 4 endpoint, verify it picks up the issue, spawns an agent, generates code, and completes the turn. Equivalent to Elixir live_e2e_test.exs but using GitHub Issues + Gemma 4 instead of Linear + GPT.

gap.title: Full subprocess protocol test against real Codex/agent
gap.description: Test the AppServer JSON-RPC client against a real codex app-server subprocess (or a mock server that faithfully implements the protocol), verifying the full initialize/thread/turn lifecycle with actual stdio.

gap.title: Terminal status dashboard golden snapshot tests
gap.description: Port status_dashboard_snapshot_test.exs: idle dashboard, idle with URL, super busy dashboard, backoff queue pressure, escaped newlines in errors, unlimited credits variant. Requires implementing the full terminal renderer first (IMPL-001).

gap.title: Extensions integration tests
gap.description: Port extensions_test.exs: workflow store lifecycle (hot-reload, broken YAML keeps last good, path change, stopped store still serves cached), tracker delegation (memory + github adapters), Phoenix API responses (GET /state, GET /:identifier, POST /refresh, 405/404/unavailable/timeout).

gap.title: Orchestrator status snapshot edge cases
gap.description: Missing from orchestrator_status_test.exs: TPS graph rendering for steady and ramping throughput, historical TPS bar stability, terminal width expansion, full codex event set humanization (17 event types), dynamic tool wrapper events, nested payload envelope unwrapping, shell command line as exec status, auto-approval/auto-answered formatting, reasoning and message streaming enrichment.

gap.title: Config env fallback edge cases
gap.description: Missing from core_test.exs: LINEAR_API_KEY env var fallback for tracker api_key, LINEAR_ASSIGNEE env var fallback, legacy "env:" references treated as literals, schema parse normalizes policy keys, sandbox policy resolution (explicit pass-through, default from workspace root, remote vs local expansion).

gap.title: Remote SSH workspace lifecycle tests
gap.description: Missing from workspace_and_config_test.exs: remote workspace create/hooks/ remove use SSH host aliases from worker config, SSH port parsing, remote sandbox policy resolution, tilde path expansion for local vs raw for remote.

gap.title: Linear client edge cases
gap.description: Missing tests: pagination merge preserves ordering, paginates state fetches beyond one page (55 IDs split into 50+5), logs response bodies for non-200 GraphQL responses, marks explicitly unassigned issues as not routed to worker.

gap.title: Prompt builder in-repo WORKFLOW.md rendering test
gap.description: Test that the actual WORKFLOW.md in the repo renders correctly with continuation and attempt context. Verify the in-repo file is valid.
gap.elixir-equivalent: core_test.exs "current WORKFLOW.md file is valid" + prompt builder tests

gap.title: App server agent runner integration edge cases
gap.description: Missing: app server startup with configurable codex args from workflow, agent runner surfaces SSH startup failures with proper error type, agent runner forwards timestamped codex updates with session_id. Some of these may be partially covered but need deeper assertions.

gap.title: Terminal status dashboard renderer
gap.description: Implement the full ANSI terminal UI renderer equivalent to Elixir StatusDashboard GenServer. Features: agent table with columns (ISSUE, STATE, SESSION, TURNS, TOKENS, EVENT, STARTED, HOST), retry queue table, token throughput with 10-minute sparkline graph, rate limits display, poll countdown, coalesced rendering (rate-limited to render_interval_ms), terminal width detection and row expansion.

gap.title: PR cleanup on workspace removal
gap.description: Implement workspace.before_remove task that finds and closes open PRs for the branch being removed. Uses gh CLI to list and close PRs. Tolerates close failures. No-ops when git/gh unavailable.

gap.title: PR body format checker
gap.description: Implement PR body validation: template headings present and in order, no placeholder text remaining, non-empty sections, bullet/checkbox requirements met. Port from pr_body.check mix task.

gap.title: LiveView dashboard PubSub push instead of polling
gap.description: Replace the 1s polling in the Phoenix LiveView dashboard with WebSocket push from the Python backend. Python FastAPI should broadcast state changes via WebSocket; Phoenix LiveView should subscribe and render on push events rather than polling /api/v1/state.

gap.title: Run mypy strict mode and fix type errors
gap.description: Run mypy with strict mode across the entire symphony/ package. Fix all type errors, add missing type annotations, resolve Any usage.

gap.title: Run ruff linter and fix all warnings
gap.description: Add ruff configuration, run across entire codebase, fix all warnings. Enforce consistent style.

gap.title: Review agent-generated code for logic correctness
gap.description: Four agents wrote code in parallel with interface mismatches. While field name issues were fixed, the orchestrator dispatch logic, retry state machine, and reconciliation logic need manual review for subtle bugs that tests may not catch (race conditions, edge cases in async task management, token accounting arithmetic).

gap.title: Add GitHub Actions CI pipeline
gap.description: Set up .github/workflows/ci.yml with: pytest, mypy, ruff, and optionally the Phoenix dashboard compilation check.

gap.title: GitHub tracker retry and rate limiting
gap.description: Add exponential backoff retry on transient HTTP errors (429, 500, 502, 503) and respect GitHub's X-RateLimit-Remaining/Reset headers. The Elixir Linear adapter handles this; our GitHub adapter does not.
gap.elixir-equivalent: linear/client.ex retry and rate limit handling

gap.title: WorkflowStore concurrent-safe caching
gap.description: The current WorkflowStore hot-reload is simpler than the Elixir GenServer version. Needs proper thread-safe caching with asyncio locks, scheduled polling via asyncio.create_task, and graceful shutdown. Currently uses threading.Thread which may not integrate cleanly with the asyncio event loop.

gap.title: Graceful orchestrator shutdown
gap.description: Ensure orchestrator.stop() properly cancels all running agent tasks, waits for graceful completion or timeout, saves state, and renders offline status. Test that in-flight agents are cleaned up.
